@metadata.comment: Don't know how often I'll update this top part lol

errors.CharTooLong: Char on line $1 is too long, they may only contain one character
errors.ParNoMatch: Parentheses on line $1 don't match, can not assemble
errors.dataInText: Data must only be in the data directive, found $2 on line $1
errors.wrongDirrectiveFloat: Found a float when the directive was integer on line $1
errors.stringOutsideOfDirrective: A string may not be outside of a string directive found on line $1
errors.lableCantFloat: Labels are not able to be stored in float or double, error found on line $1
errors.varOutsideMacro: Variable found outside of macro on line $1
errors.parenthesesWeird: Parentheses on line $1 are not valid syntax
errors.dataDirectiveInText: Data directives are not allowed in text on line $1
errors.InstructionNeededMoreParams: Instruction expected more parameters than given on line $1
errors.expectedRegi: Expected register but found something else on line $1
errors.expectFloatReg: Expected a float register, instead got int register on line $1
errors.expectIntReg: Expected an int register, instead got float register on line $1
errors.tooManyArguments: Instruction got too many argument on line $1
errors.tooFewArguments: Instruction got too few argument on line $1
errors.expectedInt: Instruction expected int, got something else on line $1
errors.OutOfBounts32bit: Integer expected to be in range -2147483648, 2147483647 got $2 on line $1
errors.OutOfBounts20bit: Integer expected to be in range -524288, 524287 got $2 on line $1
errors.OutOfBounts12bit: Integer expected to be in range -2048, 2047 got $2 on line $1
errors.OutOfBounds5bit: Integer expected to be in range 0 to 31 got $2 on line $1
errors.expectOffreg: Expected offset register but found something else on line $1
errors.OutOfBountsOff12bit: Offset expected to be in range -2048, 2047 got $2 on line $1
errors.TooManyPars: Too many values are in the parentheses on line $1
errors.TooFewPars: Too few values are in the parentheses on line $1
errors.expectedLabel: Expected label got something else on line $1
errors.expectedLabelPars: Expected label in parentheses on line $1
errors.UErrorType2: Instruction expected 20 bit immediate or label but found neither on line $1
errors.unmatchedLabel: Label $2 on line $1 has no definition
errors.evilJump: Somehow you tried to do a non-aligned jump on line $1 (if you see this error something went really wrong)
errors.notAString: Expected string, got $2 instead on line $1
errors.expectGlobal: Expected label on line $1 but did not, exiting
errors.unmatchedGlobal: Global does not match any definition in the file on line $1, exiting
errors.macroName: Macro expected name on line $1 but did not get a name, exiting.
errors.macroArgs: Macro expected arguments in parentheses on line $1 but got something else instead, exiting.
errors.eqvName: Eqv expected arguments in parentheses on line $1 but got something else instead, exiting.
errors.tooManyArgumentsMacro: Macro on line $1 got too many arguments, expected $2 got $3
errors.tooFewArgumentsMacro: Macro on line $1 got too few arguments, expected $2 got $3

runTimeErrors.outOfBoundsRead: Attempted a read out of bounds at $1, exiting
runTimeErrors.outOfBoundsWrite: Attempted a write out of bounds as $1, exiting
runTimeErrors.unknownInstruction: Ran into an unknown instruction with opcode $1, exiting
runTimeErrors.unknownSysCall: Ran into an unknown system call $1, existing

startScreen: Open a file or start a project!
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete $1?

project.name: Project name:
project.pleaseEnterName: You may not leave the name black, please enter a name
project.nameTaken: This name is already taken by another project

unsaved: There are unsaved changes, are you sure you want to close this file?

ecall.addDescs: ecall $1: Execute the system call stored in a7

add.addDescs: add t1, t2, t3 $1: Set t1 to t2 plus t3

addi.addDescs: addi t1, t2, -100 $1: Set t1 to t2 plus 12-bit immediate

addiw.addDescs: addiw t1, t2, -100 $1: Set t1 to t2 plus 12-bit immediate only using the lower 32 bits

xori.addDescs: xori t1, t2, -100 $1: Set t1 to t2 XOR sign-extended 12-bit immediate

ori.addDescs: ori t1, t2, -100 $1: Set t1 to t2 OR sign-extended 12-bit immediate

andi.addDescs: andi t1, t2, -100 $1: Set t1 to t2 AND sign-extended 12-bit immediate

and.addDescs: and t1, t2, t3 $1: Set t1 to t2 AND t3

or.addDescs: or t1, t2, t3 $1: Set t1 to t2 OR t3

xor.addDescs: xor t1, t2, t3 $1: Set t1 to t2 XOR t3

lui.addDescs: lui t1, 10000 $1: Set t1 to the 20-bit immediate left shifted by 12

auipc.addDescs: auipc t1, 10000 $1: Set t1 to the 20-bit immediate left shifted by 12 plus the PC

jal.addDescs:
jal t1, label $1: Set t1 to the program counter then jump to the label
jal label $1: set ra to the program counter then jump to the label

jalr.addDescs:
jalr t1, t2, -100 $1: Set t1 to the program counter (return address) then jump to t2 + immediate
jalr t1 $1: Jump to address t1 and set the return address to ra
jalr t1 100 $1: Jump to address t1 plus the immediate and set the return address to ra
jalr t1 100(t2) $1: Jump to address t2 plus the immediate and set the return address to t1

sub.addDescs: sub t1, t2, t3 $1: Set t1 to t2 minus t3

beq.addDescs: beq t1, t2, label $1: Branch to label if t1 and t2 are equal

bne.addDescs: bne t1, t2, label $1: Branch to label if t1 and t2 are not equal

blt.addDescs: blt t1, t2, label $1: Branch to label if t1 is less than t2

bltu.addDescs: bltu t1, t2, label $1: Branch to label if t1 is less than t2 (unsigned)

bge.shortDesc: Branch if Greater Than Or Equal
bge.addDescs: bge t1, t2, label $1: Branch to label if t1 is greater than or equal t2

bgeu.shortDesc: Branch if Greater Than Or Equal Unsigned
bgeu.addDescs: bgeu t1, t2, label $1: Branch to label if t1 is greater than or equal t2 (unsigned)

la.addDescs: la t1, label $1: Set t1 to label's address

b.addDescs: b label $1: Branch to label unconditionally

j.addDescs: j label $1: Jump to label unconditionally

li.addDescs:
li t1, -100 $1: Set t1 to 12-bit immediate
li t1, 10000000 $1: Set t1 to 32-bit immediate

sb.addDescs:
sb t1, -100(t2) $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory byte address
sb t1, t2 $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory byte address
sb t1, 100 $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory byte address
sb t1, label, t2 $1: Store contents of t1 to the label using t2 as a temporary

sh.addDescs:
sh t1, -100(t2) $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory halfword address
sh t1, t2 $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory halfword address
sh t1, 100 $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory halfword address
sh t1, label, t2 $1: Store contents of t1 to the label using t2 as a temporary

sw.addDescs:
sw t1, -100(t2) $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory word address
sw t1, t2 $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory word address
sw t1, 100 $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory word address
sw t1, label, t2 $1: Store contents of t1 to the label using t2 as a temporary

sd.addDescs:
sd t1, -100(t2) $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory double word address
sd t1, t2 $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory double word address
sd t1, 100 $1: Store contents of t1 into the effective memory double word address
sd t1, label, t2 $1: Store contents of t1 to the label using t2 as a temporary

lb.addDescs:
lb t1, -100(t2) $1: Load t1 to the effective memory byte address
lb t1, t2 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory byte address
lb t1, 100 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory byte address
lb t1, label $1: Set the contents of t1 to the byte found at the label

lbu.addDescs:
lbu t1, -100(t2) $1: Load t1 to the effective memory unsigned byte address
lbu t1, t2 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory unsigned byte address
lbu t1, 100 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory unsigned byte address
lbu t1, label $1: Set the contents of t1 to the unsigned byte found at the label

lh.addDescs:
lh t1, -100(t2) $1: Load t1 to the effective memory halfword address
lh t1, t2 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory halfword address
lh t1, 100 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory halfword address
lh t1, label $1: Set the contents of t1 to the halfword found at the label

lhu.addDescs:
lhu t1, -100(t2) $1: Load t1 to the effective memory unsigned halfword address
lhu t1, t2 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory unsigned halfword address
lhu t1, 100 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory unsigned halfword address
lhu t1, label $1: Set the contents of t1 to the unsigned halfword found at the label

lw.addDescs:
lw t1, -100(t2) $1: Load t1 to the effective memory word address
lw t1, t2 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory word address
lw t1, 100 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory word address
lw t1, label $1: Set the contents of t1 to the word found at the label

ld.addDescs:
ld t1, -100(t2) $1: Load t1 to the effective memory double word address
ld t1, t2 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory double word address
ld t1, 100 $1: Load t1 to the effective memory double word address
ld t1, label $1: Set the contents of t1 to the double word found at the label

sll.addDescs: sll t1, t2, t3 $1: Store s2 left shifted by the low 5 bits of s3 in s1

srl.addDescs: srl t1, t2, t3 $1: Store s2 logically right shifted by the low 5 bits of s3 in s1

sra.addDescs: sra t1, t2, t3 $1: Store s2 arithmetically right shifted by the low 5 bits of s3 in s1

srai.addDescs: srai t1, t2, 10 $1: Store s2 arithmetically right shifted by the immediate

slli.addDescs: slli t1, t2, 10 $1: Store s2 left shifted by the immediate in s1

srli.addDescs: srli t1, t2, 10 $1: Store s2 logically right shifted by the immediate in s1

srla.addDescs: srla t1, t2, 10 $1: Store s2 arithmetically right shifted by the immediate in s1

slt.addDescs: slt t1, t2, t3 $1: If t2 is less than t3 set t1 to 1 otherwise set it to 0

slti.addDescs: slti t1, t2, 10 $1: If t2 is less than the immediate set t1 to 1 otherwise set it to 0

sltu.addDescs: sltu t1, t2, t3 $1: If t2 is less than t3 set t1 to 1 otherwise set it to 0 (unsigned)

sltiu.addDescs: sltiu t1, t2, 10 $1: If t2 is less than the immediate set t1 to 1 otherwise set it to 0 (unsigned)

directives.global: Declare the listed label(s) as global to enable referencing from other files
directives.text: Store items after this (Instructions) at next available text address
directives.eqv: Replace the first item with what follows (like #define in C)
directives.data: Store the next items in the data segment
directives.dword: Store listed values as 64 bit double words
directives.word: Store listed values as 32 bit words
directives.half: Store listed values as 16 bit halfwords
directives.byte: Store listed values as 8 bit bytes
directives.ascii: Store the following string(s) without null terminators
directives.asciz: Store the following string(s) with null terminators
directives.double: Stores the list values as 64 bit floats
directives.float: Stores the list values as 32 bit floats
